name: Slightly Potted Cocktail Franks
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Cocktail frankfurters, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------SAUCE-----------------------------------
1/4 cup Bourbon
1/2 cup Chili sauce
1/4 cup Dark brown sugar
2 tablespoons Dijon mustard
2 tablespoons Tomato preserves
Combine the sauce ingredients and bring to a boil. Simmer for 5 minutes.
Add the frankfurters, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Transfer to a chafing dish and have toothpicks nearby. Makes 36 little franks.
